legal.title: Legal
legal.privacy_desc: Read how we handle your data and privacy.
legal.terms_desc: By using this app, you agree to these legal terms.

guest.title: You're browsing as a guest
guest.subtitle: Log in to sync your tasks, access your history, and enjoy all the benefits.

status.granted: Notifications are enabled on this device.
status.unsupported: Notifications are not supported by your browser.
status.default: Enable to receive reminders for scheduled tasks.

delete.title: Delete Project
delete.confirm_question: Are you sure you want to delete
delete.warning: Tasks linked to this project will NOT be deleted.

data_collected.title: 1. Data Collected
data_collected.p1: Our application, <0>Done.</0>, collects and stores data necessary for task management. This includes task content, project names, due dates, and your preferences.
data_collected.p2: When you create an account, we may store your name and email address to sync your data across devices.

usage.title: 2. How We Use Your Data
usage.p1: Your data is used exclusively to facilitate your productivity. We organize your tasks and send you notifications for due dates. We do not use your task content for training AI models or for any advertising profiling.

storage.title: 3. Local vs. Cloud Storage
storage.p1: We prioritize your privacy by keeping most of your data in your device's local storage.
storage.p2: If you use our cloud sync feature, your tasks are encrypted during transmission and when stored on our secure servers.

sharing.title: 4. Sharing and Disclosure
sharing.p1: We <0>NEVER</0> sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal data to third parties. Your productivity is private.

rights.title: 5. Your Rights
rights.p1: You have the right to access, export, or delete all your data at any time. Within the app settings, you can clear your local storage or delete your account.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.p1: By accessing or using <0>Done.</0>, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to all these terms, you may not use the application.

description.title: 2. Description of Service
description.p1: Done. is a task management application designed to help you organize your productivity. We provide tools to create, manage, and sync tasks across your devices.

responsibilities.title: 3. User Responsibilities
responsibilities.p1: You are responsible for the content you create within the app. You agree not to use the service for any illegal or unauthorized purpose.
responsibilities.p2: You must maintain the security of your account and notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.

property.title: 4. Intellectual Property
property.p1: The application, including its design, code, and original content, is the property of Done. Application. You may not reproduce or distribute any part of the service without our permission.

liability.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
liability.p1: Done. is provided "as is" without any warranties. We are not liable for any data loss or productivity issues resulting from the use of the application.

modifications.title: 6. Modifications
modifications.p1: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Your continued use of the app after such changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

not_found.title: Page not found
not_found.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.

task_not_found.title: Task not found
task_not_found.description: We couldn't find the task you're looking for. It might have been deleted.

task_drawer.title: Task Details
task_drawer.description: View and edit the details of your task here.

delete_confirm.title: Are you absolutely sure?
delete_confirm.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your task.

empty_state.title: Wow, you did it!
empty_state.body: Every task is complete. Enjoy your free time!

empty_state.title: All caught up!
empty_state.body: You crushed your to-do list. Time to relax.

empty_state.title: Zero tasks remaining!
empty_state.body: Great job tackling everything for today.

empty_state.title: Boom! List cleared.
empty_state.body: Take a deep breath, smile, and rest up.

footer.keyboard_hint: Type and press <kbd>Ctrl + Enter</kbd> to add a task

hero.description: Done. is the minimalist task manager designed to clear your head and amplify your focus. No clutter, just your list.

clarity.title: Mental Clarity
clarity.description: Stop holding everything in your head. Done. is designed to help you offload your thoughts instantly so you can actually focus on working.

distractions.title: Zero Distractions
distractions.description: Most apps are cluttered with features you'll never use. We keep it simple: one list, one goal, and a pure sense of accomplishment.

priorities.title: Master Priorities
priorities.description: Instantly mark what's critical and what can wait. Our visual hierarchy ensures you always know your most important next step.

followups.title: Smart Follow-ups
followups.description: Get gentle nudges that keep you moving forward. We handle the reminders so you can keep your focus where it belongs: on the task.

pricing.title: Choose Focus.
pricing.subtitle: Get started for free or unlock the full power of Done.

started.title: Started
started.description: Everything you need to stop holding tasks in your head.

pro.title: Pro
pro.description: Unlock the full potential of your focus and workflow.

cta.title: Stop Overcomplicating.
cta.subtitle: Start getting your life in order today.

testimonials.title: Focus-Seekers Choice.
testimonials.subtitle: Join thousands of users who simplified their life this week.

marcos.name: Marcos Oliveira
marcos.content: The clean UI helps me reach deep focus in seconds. No more distraction-heavy todo apps.

juliana.name: Juliana Souza
juliana.content: Projects and importance flags changed my game. Simple hierarchy for a complex workflow.

ricardo.name: Ricardo Lima
ricardo.content: PWA notifications on my Android phone ensure I never miss an assignment. Simple and works.
